task_name: Add Phase Scanner Council Trigger Review Fixture
goal: Add a Phase Scanner fixture for council-trigger review behavior and update the coverage map without changing scanner runtime behavior.
claims: BP-040 adds a council-trigger review fixture.
BP-040 proves the MVP degrades council-trigger cases to require_human_review while setting council_required=true.
BP-040 updates the coverage map and does not change Phase Scanner runtime behavior.
assumptions: Existing runtime behavior already marks council-trigger cases as review-only with council_required=true.
The coverage map must be updated in the same block because BP-036 enforces it.
dod: Council-trigger review fixture exists and is tested.
Coverage map lists the new fixture and removes the covered council gap.
stop_conditions: Live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, or external system behavior becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-039 closed the adapter-dependency coverage gap; council-trigger review remained uncovered.
